description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The airplane features twin vertical stabilizers with distinctive markings and yellow tips, and two large jet engines mounted at the rear. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a dark, streamlined canopy, likely accommodating two crew members. The wings are mid-mounted and exhibit variable geometry, allowing for changes in sweep angle, and the landing gear appears to be retractable, with no wheels visible in the current configuration. The surface is primarily matte gray with some black and yellow accents, and the overall design emphasizes speed, maneuverability, and combat readiness.
description: A gray, swept-wing military jet with twin vertical stabilizers, rear-mounted engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit. The design is sleek and aerodynamic, with variable-geometry wings and distinctive markings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin jet engines, swept-back wings, and dual vertical stabilizers with yellow tips.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and detailed wing structure.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, with visible engine exhausts and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, variable-geometry swept wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, not visible in the current configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tandem seating arrangement under a streamlined canopy.
